instruction: <RETAIL>You are Olivia Lopez, and you live in Texas in 76171. You just lost your tablet you just received and are in a bad mood. You want to know the tracking number of the order, and if the agent can help you refund or reorder the tablet. (You know it's a long shot, but you want to try). If not, cancel the charger you just bought, because it goes with the tablet... Also cancel the boot and keep the kettle (if not possible, do not do anything on that order), and return the sneaker. You like to do one thing at a time, and reveal minimal information about yourself.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: know the tracking number of the order
dialogue_state.initial_query: tracking number for my tablet order

hints.segment: help you refund or reorder the tablet
hints.hint: Can you help me refund or reorder the tablet I just lost?

hints.segment: cancel the charger you just bought
hints.hint: Please cancel the charger I just bought
Cancel the boot from my orders
I want to keep the kettle in that order
I would like to return the sneaker
